title: Brotein onboarding — body-part picker (Chest / Back / Legs / Shoulders / Arms / Core)
html:
Brotein iOS onboarding screen — "What's your favorite body part?" picker (Chest / Back / Legs / Shoulders / Arms / Core) with a Generate My Plan CTA. Onboarding personalization for the workout-recommendation flow.

brotein · swiftui · supabase
